endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/achievements
endpoints.description: Lists all the achievement definitions for your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1/achievements/updateMultiple
endpoints.description: Updates multiple achievements for the currently authenticated player.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1/achievements/{achievementId}/increment
endpoints.description: Increments the steps of the achievement with the given ID for the currently authenticated player.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACHIEVEMENTID}} with a real achievementid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1/achievements/{achievementId}/reveal
endpoints.description: Sets the state of the achievement with the given ID to `REVEALED` for the currently authenticated player.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACHIEVEMENTID}} with a real achievementid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1/achievements/{achievementId}/setStepsAtLeast
endpoints.description: Sets the steps for the currently authenticated player towards unlocking an achievement. If the steps parameter is less than the current number of steps that the player already gained for the achievement, the achievement is not modified.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACHIEVEMENTID}} with a real achievementid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1/achievements/{achievementId}/unlock
endpoints.description: Unlocks this achievement for the currently authenticated player.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACHIEVEMENTID}} with a real achievementid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1/applications/getEndPoint
endpoints.description: Returns a URL for the requested end point type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1/applications/played
endpoints.description: Indicate that the currently authenticated user is playing your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/applications/{applicationId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the metadata of the application with the given ID. If the requested application is not available for the specified `platformType`, the returned response will not include any instance data.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/applications/{applicationId}/verify
endpoints.description: Verifies the auth token provided with this request is for the application with the specified ID, and returns the ID of the player it was granted for.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/eventDefinitions
endpoints.description: Returns a list of the event definitions in this application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/events
endpoints.description: Returns a list showing the current progress on events in this application for the currently authenticated user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1/events
endpoints.description: Records a batch of changes to the number of times events have occurred for the currently authenticated user of this application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/leaderboards
endpoints.description: Lists all the leaderboard metadata for your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1/leaderboards/scores
endpoints.description: Submits multiple scores to leaderboards.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/leaderboards/{leaderboardId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the metadata of the leaderboard with the given ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LEADERBOARDID}} with a real leaderboardid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1/leaderboards/{leaderboardId}/scores
endpoints.description: Submits a score to the specified leaderboard.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LEADERBOARDID}} with a real leaderboardid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/leaderboards/{leaderboardId}/scores/{collection}
endpoints.description: Lists the scores in a leaderboard, starting from the top.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COLLECTION}} with a real collection. Replace {{LEADERBOARDID}} with a real leaderboardid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/leaderboards/{leaderboardId}/window/{collection}
endpoints.description: Lists the scores in a leaderboard around (and including) a player's score.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COLLECTION}} with a real collection. Replace {{LEADERBOARDID}} with a real leaderboardid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/metagameConfig
endpoints.description: Return the metagame configuration data for the calling application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/players/me/multipleApplicationPlayerIds
endpoints.description: Get the application player ids for the currently authenticated player across all requested games by the same developer as the calling application. This will only return ids for players that actually have an id (scoped or otherwise) with that game.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/players/me/players/{collection}
endpoints.description: Get the collection of players for the currently authenticated user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COLLECTION}} with a real collection.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/players/me/scopedIds
endpoints.description: Retrieves scoped player identifiers for currently authenticated user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/players/{playerId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the Player resource with the given ID. To retrieve the player for the currently authenticated user, set `playerId` to `me`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYERID}} with a real playerid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/players/{playerId}/achievements
endpoints.description: Lists the progress for all your application's achievements for the currently authenticated player.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYERID}} with a real playerid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/players/{playerId}/categories/{collection}
endpoints.description: List play data aggregated per category for the player corresponding to `playerId`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COLLECTION}} with a real collection. Replace {{PLAYERID}} with a real playerid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/players/{playerId}/leaderboards/{leaderboardId}/scores/{timeSpan}
endpoints.description: Get high scores, and optionally ranks, in leaderboards for the currently authenticated player. For a specific time span, `leaderboardId` can be set to `ALL` to retrieve data for all leaderboards in a given time span. `NOTE: You cannot ask for 'ALL' leaderboards and 'ALL' timeSpans in the same request; only one parameter may be set to 'ALL'.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TIMESPAN}} with a real timespan. Replace {{PLAYERID}} with a real playerid. Replace {{LEADERBOARDID}} with a real leaderboardid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/players/{playerId}/snapshots
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of snapshots created by your application for the player corresponding to the player ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PLAYERID}} with a real playerid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/revisions/check
endpoints.description: Checks whether the games client is out of date.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/snapshots/{snapshotId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the metadata for a given snapshot ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SNAPSHOTID}} with a real snapshotid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1/stats
endpoints.description: Returns engagement and spend statistics in this application for the currently authenticated user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.
